programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau Jr. is no stranger to exploration. The grandson of legendary underwater explorer Jacques Cousteau, Philippe hosts and serves as executive producer of this half-hour earth science series that examines the planet. He visits diamond and gold mines to see how gems and metals are formed, travels to active volcanoes to observe what happens inside the Earth's burning core, and checks out weather stations in mountainous areas to get an idea of how weather phenomena form in the atmosphere.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau Jr. is no stranger to exploration. The grandson of legendary underwater explorer Jacques Cousteau, Philippe hosts and serves as executive producer of this half-hour earth science series that examines the planet. He visits diamond and gold mines to see how gems and metals are formed, travels to active volcanoes to observe what happens inside the Earth's burning core, and checks out weather stations in mountainous areas to get an idea of how weather phenomena form in the atmosphere.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: The "don't try this at home" warning seen on some TV shows doesn't apply to this series, which encourages the discovery of scientific concepts through experiments that viewers can reproduce in their own homes. Science teacher Steve Spangler hosts the show, providing step-by-step demonstrations of the DIY experiments that help explain scientific principles. Among the experiments presented is one that gained Spangler fame, in which he showed what happens when a mint candy is dropped into a bottle of diet soda. On the show, he explains the "why" and "how" behind the experiment and what cause the soda to react with the candy.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Corey Rodrigues
programme.desc: Corey is a highly sought after national touring college, club and corporate and cruise ship performer. He was the winner of The Catch a New Rising Star, The Funniest Comic in New England and the 2017 Big Sky Comedy Festivals. Rodrigues has been featured on the hilarious Gotham Live, Laughs on Fox and True Tv's Laff Mobbs Laff Tracks television shows and currently can be heard on Sirius XM. He combines comedy from his own life and the lives of those around him. Mix that with a hilarious point of view and he's able to talk about just about anything.

programme.title: Dave Nihill
programme.desc: Dave is the winner of the prestigious 43rd annual San Francisco Comedy Competition, and runner up in the Moth's largest US Grandslam storytelling competition.

programme.title: Glen Tickle: The Favorite
programme.desc: Glen Tickle apologizes for his last name, explains the things only professional comedians have time for, and tells all the stories hes only allowed to tell on stage.

programme.title: Costaki Economopoulos
programme.desc: For 20 years Costaki has been living his dream as a full-time stand up comic. He has written jokes for Bette Midler, Jay Leno, MTV, and BET. You may have seen him on Showtime or heard him on Sirius, but you probably know him best from his regular appearances on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Radio Show.

programme.title: Jeff Big Daddy Wayne
programme.desc: Comedian Jeff Wayne was dubbed “Big Daddy” by Billy Crystal and Robin Williams on an HBO Comic Relief show. The moniker has stuck to a guy who's been part of the stand-up comedy scene for a long time. He's toured all over the world, several times in Europe. The Norwegian Newspaper “Sondags B.A.”, described him as having “amazing audience communication, and ferociously funny!”

programme.title: Dave Burleigh
programme.desc: Comedian and Impressionist Dave Burleigh's star is on the rise. His uncanny ability to impersonate just about anyone landed him the starring role as Charlie Sheen in "Not Another Celebrity Movie." Burleigh's multiple characters, voices, and impressions were showcased on Season 7 of America's Got Talent, where he became a fast favorite of both judges and fans alike. Judge Howard Stern said, "You have an excellent command of the stage." Fellow comedian and judge Howie Mandel added, "Your impressions were spot on." Burleigh's laid back and easy going style and persona on stage contrasted with his unique facial and body expressions are guaranteed to leave audiences amazed and impressed. As a two-time finalist in the San Francisco Comedy Competition, Burleigh now shares the first runner-up spot with past participant comedy legends like Robin Williams, Ellen DeGeneres, Marc Maron, Dane Cook and Kevin Pollak. With numerous television, podcast and radio appearances, prestigious publications like Rolling Stone are talking, "Burleigh has the trappings of a soon to be comedy star!" This talented, singer, musician, actor, comedian and host tours the world over 36 weeks a year and headlines all the major casinos in Las Vegas. Make sure to catch Dave's show at a theater or comedy club near you, as he will no doubt, leave you with a lasting impression.

programme.title: Tommy Drake
programme.desc: Tommy's unique mixture of original material delivered in a classic style has given him the opportunity to do more shows and be seen by more people live than just about any other comic on the planet.

programme.title: Tom Mabe
programme.desc: Tom has been profiled in People magazine, called "gut-busting hilarious" by The New York Times, and given a perfect 4-star rating by the New York Post. He's been featured on radio shows from Hollywood to Dollywood, including "Bob&Tom", Johnboy & Billy "BillHandel" and "Drew&Mike". Chances are you also know Tom as the star of CMT's hit comedy series, "Mabe in America", or have watched one of his popular viral videos. With more than 50-million views on YouTube, Tom is one of the most downloaded people on the planet. People love Tom's stories about coping with life's challenges, ranging from a child with a microscopic attention span to a family vacation in a minivan that takes a wrong turn. His original songs, stories, and videos make for a night out you will remember for years.

programme.title: Mike Siegel
programme.desc: Mike Siegel is a stand-up comedian, TV host, and actor. For nine years, he hosted TBS network's TBS Movie EXTRA and has hosted numerous other network shows including HGTV's If Walls Could Talk and What You Get For the Money, GSN Live on the Game Show Network, and The Next GAC Star on GAC. Along with numerous appearances as a panelist on E! network's hit show Chelsea Lately, Mike has performed stand-up comedy on many television shows, including Last Comic Standing (NBC), The Late Late Show (CBS), Late Friday (NBC), Comedy Showcase with Louie Anderson (NBC), Stand-up, Stand-up (Comedy Central), and Friday Night (NBC). Mike's also been seen on the small screen as an actor. He was a recurring guest star on the CBS drama JAG, and had supporting roles in Mike and Molly (CBS), Rules of Engagement (ABC), 24 (FOX), Prison Break (FOX), Better Off Ted (ABC), Less Than Perfect (ABC), Eve (UPN), Strong Medicine (Lifetime), Andy Richter Controls the Universe (FOX), and Sabrina (WB).

programme.title: Iliza Shlesinger War Paint
programme.desc: Her innocent good looks are just a cover for Last Comic Standing winner Iliza Shlesinger's acerbic, stream-of-conscious comedy.

programme.title: Iliza Shlesinger: Freezing Hot
programme.desc: Smart and brazen comedian Iliza Shlesinger applies her fresh, laugh-out-loud perspective to the universal struggles between men and women.

programme.title: Leah Rudick Spiraling
programme.desc: Comedian and viral social media sensation Leah Rudick delves into marriage, family psychics & anxiety attacks.

programme.title: Sarah Hester Ross Don't Mess with a Redhead
programme.desc: Meet musical comedian Sarah Hester Ross as she shows you a life of being TikTok famous.

programme.title: Hank Chen I'm Not Supposed to Be Here
programme.desc: Hank Chen delivers a rip-roaring stand-up (er, sit down) hour just 6 days after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan Noble Ape
programme.desc: In his 6th special, Jim uses humor to deal with the unthinkable & proves that laughter is the best medicine, or is it?

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this horror classic about a mad doctor who believes death is simply an evolution. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Swamp Of The Ravens!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The atom bombs have fallen, and morons are all that remains. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax & MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to the short Library World! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill as they step into Library World!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 80's horror classic! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (former stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 aka MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Shorts: Don't Be a Bloody Idiot
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this 1970s Australian camping safety short. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill and one angry Australian with a gun for Don't Be a Bloody Idiot.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Mesa of Lost Women! Not to be confused with the Plateau of Misplaced Babes or the Tundra of Girlfriends Who Keep Trying to Get You to Ask for Directions but You're Simply Just Too Foolish and Proud. Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for Mesa Of Lost Women!

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: In the real-time, high stakes thriller, George Clooney and Julia Roberts star as financial TV host Lee Gates and his producer Patty, who are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything (Jack O'Connell) forcefully takes over their studio. During a tense standoff broadcast to millions on live TV, Lee and Patty must work furiously against the clock to unravel the mystery behind a conspiracy at the heart of today's fast-paced, high-tech global markets.

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street (1994)
programme.desc: Six-year-old Susan has doubts about childhood's most enduring miracle: Santa Claus. Then Susan meets Kriss Kringle, a department store Santa who believes he's the genuine article.

programme.title: I'll Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: If a college jokester makes it home for the holidays by a certain time, his dad's Porsche is his. But, after one prank too many, he's left stranded wearing nothing but a Santa Claus suit with no option except to hitchhike cross country.

programme.title: Nothing Like The Holidays
programme.desc: The far-flung members of the Rodriguez family converge at their parents' home to face what may be their last Christmas together in this heart-warming holiday comedy.

programme.title: Jingle All The Way
programme.desc: After promising his young son that Santa will get him the number one item on the boy's wish list, a well-meaning workaholic father's Christmas Eve turns into a hilariously nightmarish, madcap scramble across the city to find the much sought-after and therefore virtually impossible-to-find toy.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: A Christmas miracle gives rival meteorologists Tara and Sam the opportunity of a lifetime to move up to the big leagues. In order to reach their dream job interview, they first have to beat an impending blizzard to the city.

programme.title: Ernest Saves Christmas
programme.desc: When Santa Claus decides to retire and pass on his magic bag of Chrismas surprises to a new St. Nick, he enlists the aid of a hilarious assortment of characters, including that lovable know-it-all Ernest P. Worrell.

programme.title: Life-Size 2: A Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Grace Manning is in over her head as CEO of Marathon Toys and her wild-child ways are causing the company's stock to plummet. Grace's old Eve doll magically awakes to help get Grace back on track.

programme.title: Sappy Holiday
programme.desc: When a hardworking but uninspired sous chef accidentally discovers her boyfriend is going to propose to her on Christmas Eve, she begins doubting their future together especially when a handsome maple farmer rescues her from a snowstorm.

programme.title: Money Train
programme.desc: Wesley and Woody are back! And this time, nothing can stop their adrenaline pumping action adventure. John (Wesley Snipes) and Charlie (Woody Harrelson) are partners, best friends and foster brothers. Both are transit cops who work undercover on the New York subway. Both are quick-witted and quick-fisted. And both are in love with the same woman. But their sibling rivalry goes over the top when Charlie decides to rob the "money train" the heavily guarded revenue train that collects millions of dollars from the subway booths. Now it's up to John to stop his bad-boy brother...or join him for one final, phenomenal trip through the tunnel of fun!

programme.title: I, Robot
programme.desc: Superstar Will Smith stars in this futuristic action-adventure about a techno-phobic police detective who teams up with a humanoid robot to thwart a worldwide revolution.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: In the real-time, high stakes thriller, George Clooney and Julia Roberts star as financial TV host Lee Gates and his producer Patty, who are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything (Jack O'Connell) forcefully takes over their studio. During a tense standoff broadcast to millions on live TV, Lee and Patty must work furiously against the clock to unravel the mystery behind a conspiracy at the heart of today's fast-paced, high-tech global markets.

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street (1994)
programme.desc: Six-year-old Susan has doubts about childhood's most enduring miracle: Santa Claus. Then Susan meets Kriss Kringle, a department store Santa who believes he's the genuine article.

programme.title: Exodus: Gods And Kings
programme.desc: Acclaimed director Ridley Scott brings new life to the epic story of Moses (Christian Bale) as he takes on the might of an empire and rises up against the Egyptian Pharaoh.

programme.title: Reign of Fire
programme.desc: When workers in a London tunneling project awaken an unearthly fire-breathing beast from centuries of slumber, all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Kingdom of Heaven
programme.desc: Balian, a blacksmith who inherits the title of his illegitimate father, Godfrey of Ibelin, becomes a key player in the defense of Jerusalem when it is attacked by Saladin, during the time of the Crusades - that world-shaping 200-year collision between Europe and the East.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: Based on the true story of the greatest treasure hunt in history, THE MONUMENTS MEN centers around an unlikely World War II platoon, tasked with going into Germany to rescue artistic masterpieces from Nazi thieves and returning them to their rightful owners. In a seemingly impossible mission, the Monuments Men, as they were called, find themselves risking their lives in a race against time to avoid the destruction of 1,000 years of culture.

programme.title: Angel of Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Susan gets her first big break to write her own headline story.

programme.title: All Saints Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. R&B singer Lisette travels home to New Orleans for Christmas with a fake fiancé.

programme.title: Christmas Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Belinda and her ex are forced to team up for the towns Christmas Scavenger Hunt.

programme.title: Merry Matrimony
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Brie has to work with her ex to organize the perfect Christmas photo shoot.

programme.title: Hitched for the Holidays
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Both Rob Marino and Julie Green are feeling pressure to be in a relationship.

programme.title: Hot Chocolate Holiday
programme.desc: Colette runs a coffee shop that is known for her secret and famous hot chocolate.

programme.title: Baking Spirits Bright
programme.desc: Mira takes pride in her fruitcake business, despite its declining popularity.

programme.title: Mini Movie: The Ugly Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: During her first days working at a social media company.

programme.title: Baking All the Way
programme.desc: Pastry chef Julia Wilson visits a small town bakery for her Christmas cookbook.

programme.title: A Recipe for Joy
programme.desc: Carly Hayes helps shy Chef Quinn reopen his family's diner on TV.

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on Earth.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: An army pilot must travel through time using the 'Source Code' in order to identify a ruthless bomber.

programme.title: Gamer
programme.desc: In a future mind-controlling game, death row convicts are forced to battle in a 'Doom'-type environment.

programme.title: The Road
programme.desc: After an apocalyptic event, a father and son struggle to survive on a quest to reach the ocean.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In hopes of wooing a girl, Tristan promises to bring her a falling star. He soon discovers the star is actually a celestial beauty named Yvaine. When an old witch, Lamia attempts to steal Yvaine?s youth, Tristan must protect her.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: When NY City is in trouble, it's up to the four ninja-fighting, pizza-loving brothers to save it. Aided by determined reporter April O'Neil and their wise master Splinter, these unlikely heroes must face their ultimate nemesis - the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: John works with the PreCrime police with the help of three 'PreCogs' who can foresee crimes.

programme.title: Mission
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins.

programme.title: Mission
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose.

programme.title: The Princess And The Marine
programme.desc: A Bahraini princess and an American soldier risk their lives for true love.

programme.title: Fireproof
programme.desc: In an attempt to save his marriage, a firefighter uses a 40-day experiment known as "The Love Dare."

programme.title: Burlesque
programme.desc: A small-town Midwestern singer goes to Hollywood to but ends up singing & dancing in a classic burlesque club.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: A heiress falls in love with the newspaperman she enlists to help her escape her father.

programme.title: You Can't Take It With You
programme.desc: Lionel Barrymore is the patriarch of a clan of artists who use his forturne to pursue their passions.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes To Washington
programme.desc: James Stewart takes on the powers-that-be in our nations capitol in Frank Capras timeless classic.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Remember the Night
programme.desc: Moved to pity by the Christmas season, New York District Attorney John Sargent (Fred MacMurray) lets pretty shoplifter Lee Leander (Barbara Stanwyck) out on bail and offers her a ride home to Indiana. Along the way they have a run-in with a Pennsylvania sheriff, meet each others' parents, and eventually fall in love. John's mother, however, disapproves, and warns Lee to stay away, lest she damage John's career. Not wanting to cause trouble, Lee resolves to leave the man she loves.

programme.title: Courting Mom and Dad
programme.desc: With help from an eccentric attorney, three children hatch an elaborate scheme to prevent their mother and father from divorcing.

programme.title: Beethoven's Christmas Adventure
programme.desc: Lovable dog Beethoven must rescue a Christmas elf and retrieve Santa Claus' magic toy bag from crooks.

programme.title: K-9
programme.desc: Michael Dooley (James Belushi) is a cop who likes to work alone. But while working a case to bust Lyman (Kevin Tighe), a notorious international drug lord, his boss (Ed O'Neill) assigns him a partner to assist. That partner is Jerry Lee, a drug-sniffing dog. A first Dooley can't stand his furry sidekick, especially since the dog seems to take pleasure in destroying Dooley's possessions. But when Dooley discovers that Jerry Lee's drug-sniffing skills are no joke, he warms up to the pooch.

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: When a woman learns of her high school reunion a week before Christmas, she's ecstatic to finally have her chance to win the one "that got away" back.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: Let Love Grow
programme.desc: Landscape architect Evie meets her match with new client Ryan, whose daughters are her biggest fan.

programme.title: Eve's Christmas
programme.desc: A wealthy and successful career woman gets a second chance in life when a magical wish transports her back in time eight years to when she walked away from her fiance to lead a business life in New York.

programme.title: A Very Country Christmas
programme.desc: Jeanette Williams is a busy single parent, trying to make the best life for her and her daughter.

programme.title: Coupled Up For Christmas
programme.desc: Pretending to be a couple in order to win over their exes, Tiffany and Peter fall for each other.

programme.title: Hope
programme.desc: Hope is sexually abused by a male stranger and experiences trauma. But with family support, she slowly heals.

programme.title: Norigae: Her Tears
programme.desc: In 2009, an actress's death exposes a major sex scandal. Journalist Lee Jang-ho risks all to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: Secret and passionate affair between Colonel Jin Pyeong, trapped in a loveless marriage with Soo Jin, and Jong Ga Heun, the Chinese-Korean wife of Captain Kyung Woo Jin happens in the summer of 1969.

programme.title: The Frozen Hearts: A Love Story
programme.desc: A couple attempt to find their way back to each other after a traumatic loss. Bombarded with advice and opinions from their friends and family about their relationship, will they work it out? Or fall out of love?

programme.title: And They Named Her Love
programme.desc: Love, a hopeless romantic painter, sets out on a cross country journey to find herself in the competitive world of artistry. When a near death experience brings Atlanta based songstress Nasada into her life, she goes on a journey to find out that love and business do not always mix.

programme.title: Glistening in the Snow
programme.desc: When struggling club owner Anaja finds out that her co-owner, Donovan, is coming to town for the holiday, she expects him to help keep the doors open. However, his fiancé Addie wants him to sell the club. When the owners and staff are trapped in the club during a snow storm, they will have to work together to resolve their issues with each other.

programme.title: Back and Forth
programme.desc: Pier and Jade found love though the emotions of skating. Love was built but trust was lost, as deep secrets unfold, back and forth between the UK and USA. Having her heart broken, Jade took her fate in her own hands. It was only a matter of time, that the only plan left was to take revenge.

programme.title: Charles Mingus, Jaki Byard, Dannie Richmond & Johnny Coles
programme.sub-title: Charles Mingus And Eric Dolphy live in Liège
programme.desc: Charles Mingus showcases an exceptional concert performed in April 1965 featuring his most celebrated lineup: Jaki Byard (piano), Dannie Richmond (drums), Johnny Coles (trumpet), Clifford Jordan (tenor sax) and the great Eric Dolphy (alto sax, flute and bass clarinet). Recorded within an eight-day span, less than three months before Dolphy's death, the three concerts showcase Mingus's visionary leadership and the band's incredible depth and diversity with unique performances and arrangements of classics including ‘So Long Eric' and the groundbreaking ‘Meditations On Integration'.

programme.title: Miles Davis
programme.desc: American trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) was a pioneering jazz musician from the late 1940s to the late 1980s. His influence on 20th century music is hard to overstate, as he trailblazed bebop, cool jazz, hardbop, modal jazz, and electronic music. On October 11, 1964, Miles Davis performed at Teatro Dell'Arte in Milan. With tenor saxophonist Wayne Shorter, pianist Herbie Hancock, bassist Ron Carter and drummer Tony Williams, Davis performed Autumn Leaves, My Funny Valentine, All Blues, All of You, and Joshua.

programme.title: Stochelo Rosenberg & Peter Beets
programme.desc: The treasured compositions of guitarist Django Reinhardt, the founding father of hot club jazz, are engraved in everyone's memory. Although Reinhardt missed two fingers of his left hand, his virtuoso technique was unrivalled. Dutch guitarist Stochelo Rosenberg and pianist Peter Beets now have the pleasure to bring Django's music back to life with their infectious improvisations.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.sub-title: Herbie Man & Sonny Sharrock - Memphis underground
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential jazz guitarists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Revel in Wes Montgomery's virtuosity as he performs the captivating “Nica's Dream” in Holland in 1965, and delight in the expressive beauty of his rendition of “Here's That Rainy Day”, recorded in London in that same year. Experience the timeless appeal of Joe Pass's “You Stepped Out of a Dream” and “You Turned The Tables on Me”, recorded live in Hanover in 1975. The interplay between Jim Hall and Atilla Zoller borders on the impossible as they perform “Extensions” in Hanover in 1973. Enjoy Jim Hall's lyrical solo performance of “I'm Getting Sentimental Over You” from 1964. Witness Sonny Sharrock's avant-garde fusion of jazz and rock in an exhilarating performance of “Peanut", recorded live in France in 1970. Sharrock is joined by flutist Herbie Mann in a soulful performance of “Memphis Underground” from 1969. Immerse yourself in the magic of jazz guitar!

programme.title: Omar Sosa, Childo Tomas, Ernesto Simpson & Leandro Saint-Hill
programme.desc: While always keeping one foot firmly anchored in the traditions of his home country, Cuba, Omar Sosa tirelessly explores music from the Caribbean to India, and West Africa to the Arab world. Since he left Cuba in 1993, the pianist has been blending his Afro-Cuban roots with jazz, hip hop, electro and world music. For his 2018 performance at Théâtre de Villefranche-sur-Saône, he brings to stage his Quarteto Afrocubano members Childo Tomas (electric bass & vocals), Ernesto Simpson (drums), and Leandro Saint-Hill (saxophones, flute, percussion & vocals). Together, they create a riveting instrumental dialogue. Celebrating rhythm in all its forms, this Omar Sosa concert is an intense and mystical experience.

programme.title: B.B.King
programme.sub-title: B.B. King Orchestra - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1979, legendary American blues guitarist B.B. King gave an unforgettable performance for the audience in The Hague. Born in 1925 in a small town in Mississippi, 'Lucille' (as he nicknamed his guitar) helped him escape a miserable existence picking cotton. He arrived in Memphis in the late 1940s, where his cousin Bukka White taught him the tricks of the blues. Soon he developed his own style. King's virtuoso, narrative solos with lots of vibrato, have been an inspiration for most (rock) guitarists after him.

programme.title: The Police
programme.desc: The Police were an English new wave band formed in London in 1977.[1] For most of their history the band consisted of Sting (lead vocals, bass guitar, primary songwriter), Andy Summers (guitar) and Stewart Copeland (drums, percussion). The Police became globally popular in the late 1970s and early 1980s and are generally regarded as one of the first new-wave groups to achieve mainstream success, playing a style of rock influenced by punk, reggae, and jazz. They are also considered one of the leaders of the Second British Invasion of the U.S. They disbanded in 1986, but reunited in early 2007 for a one-off world tour that ended in August 2008. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of The Police.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: David Bowie
programme.desc: David Bowie was the leading figure in popular music for over five decades. Acclaimed by critics and musicians for his innovative work. His career was marked by reinvention and visual presentation, his music and stagecraft significantly influencing popular music. During his lifetime, his record sales, estimated at 140 million albums worldwide, made him one of the bestselling music artists. He stopped concert touring after 2004 and his last live performance was at a charity event in 2006. In 2013, Bowie returned from a decade-long recording hiatus with the release of The Next Day. He remained musically active until his Death two days after the release of his final album, Blackstar.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse
programme.desc: Amy Winehouse was an English singer and songwriter whose stunning voice easily following in the footsteps of Janis Joplin and Billie Holiday. Her debut album, Frank (was a critical success in the UK and was nominated for the Mercury Prize. Her follow-up album, Back to Black (2006), led to five 50th Annual Grammy Awards, and a record of most Grammys won by a female artist in one night. In short, a music legend who died at the young age of 27, from alcohol intoxication on 23 July 2011. Her album Back to Black posthumously became one the UK's best-selling albums of the 21st century.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.sub-title: Live From The O2 Arena London
programme.desc: Watch this mega-production of Guns N' Roses performing live at the O2 Arena to its fans singing and vibrating to each song. Includes Paradise City, Sweet Child O' Mine, November Rain and many more.

programme.title: Kiss
programme.desc: Kiss is one of the legendary groups in Hard Rock history. They have millions of fans around the world and over 100 million records sold. KISS confirms why they have been the best on the scene for nearly four decades, in a performance that made history, impressing an audience of more than 85,000 people, in a show of more than 2 hours and packed with hits, held at the Nurburgring, Germany in 2010.

programme.title: Stingray Smooth Jazz
programme.desc: Explore the hottest contemporary jazz artists in a smooth-flowing soundscape, featuring melodic and stylish guitars, saxophones, pianos, trumpets.

programme.title: Stingray Smooth Jazz
programme.desc: Explore the hottest contemporary jazz artists in a smooth-flowing soundscape, featuring melodic and stylish guitars, saxophones, pianos, trumpets.

programme.desc: Explore the hottest contemporary jazz artists in a smooth-flowing soundscape, featuring melodic and stylish guitars, saxophones, pianos, trumpets.

programme.title: Stingray Smooth Jazz
programme.desc: Explore the hottest contemporary jazz artists in a smooth-flowing soundscape, featuring melodic and stylish guitars, saxophones, pianos, trumpets.

programme.title: Maria Luigia Borsi & Antonio Artese
programme.sub-title: Vocal works by Puccini, Leoncavallo a. o.
programme.desc: The six-concert series “Io suono italiano” is dedicated to music of Italian composers and performed by Italian musicians on Italian instruments. The concert programs cover four centuries of music: from Girolamo Frescobaldi and Antonio Vivaldi to more contemporary music by Ennio Morricone and Azio Corghi. Each program presents more familiar pieces alongside lesser-known compositions. These performances were filmed at the atmospheric Teatro Sociale in Rovigo, Italy, in January 2021. In this program, Maria Luigia Borsi (soprano) and Antonio Artese (piano) present a recital consisting of several songs and arias. On the program are Francesco Paolo Tosti's Sogno, ‘A vucchella, and L'alba separa dalla luce l'ombra Giacomo Puccini's Sole e amore, Sogno d'or, “Donde lieta” (from La Bohème), “Il bel sogno di Doretta” (from La rondine), and “O mio babbino caro” (from Gianni Schicchi) Renato Brogi's Presentimento, Ruggero Leoncavallo's Mattinata, and Alfredo Catalini's Chanson Groenlandaise.

programme.title: Jos van Immerseel, Anima Eterna Brugge, Claron McFadden & Bart Van Caenegem
programme.desc: Belgian conductor Jos van Immerseel leads Anima Eterna Brugge in a concert program dedicated to American composer George Gershwin. The program opens with Gershwin's symphonic suite Catfish Row (arr. Steven D. Bowen) which is based upon music from his famous opera Porgy and Bess (1935). This is followed by the well-known tone poem An American in Paris (1928). After, soprano Claron McFadden joins the orchestra, presenting a selection of Gershwin's classic jazz songs, including ‘The man I love' (1924-27), ‘I got rhythm' (1930), and ‘By Strauss' (1936). She also performs ‘My man's gone now' and ‘Summertime' from Porgy and Bess. The concert ends with Gershwin's celebrated Rhapsody in Blue, with Bart Van Caenegem as featured pianist. This performance was recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, on March 3, 2017.

programme.title: Vasilii Andreev
programme.desc: The award-winning Imperial Ice Stars are 26 Olympic, World, European and National Championship skaters, who jointly hold over 250 competition medals, performing theatrical ice dancing on a frozen theatre stage. The Imperial Ice Stars have received five-star praise from critics and standing ovations from audiences at some of the world's most prestigious venues - London's Royal Albert Hall and Sadler's Wells, Singapore's Esplanade Theatre, Montreal's Place des Arts and Cape Town's Artscape. This stunning performance, filmed at the Melbourne Theatre Company in Australia, offers a new look on the secular tale of Sleeping beauty, with the original music of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky (1840-1893).

programme.title: Gustavo Dudamel
programme.sub-title: De Falla - El sombrero de tres picos - Suite No. 2
programme.desc: During the New Year's Gala 2010, the Berlin Philharmonic perform under the baton of Gustavo Dudamel, whose infectious energy and exceptional artistry have made him one of the most sought-after conductors by orchestras and opera companies around the world. They welcome mezzo-soprano Elīna Garanča, who has become one of the world's most famous singers within just a few years. On the program are various works by French composers, like Berlioz' Le Carnival Romain, Overture, Op. 9 and D'Amour l'ardente flamme' from La Damnation de Faust (Op. 24), Saint-Saëns' ‘Mon cœur s'ouvre à ta voix' and ‘Danse Bacchanale' from his opera Samson et Dalila and the ‘Habanera', ‘Seguidilla' and ‘Chanson Bohème' from Bizet's Carmen. The concert concludes with de Falla's Suite No. 2 from the ballet ‘El sombrero de tres picos'.

programme.title: Leonard Slatkin, Leonard Slatkin, Orchestre National de Lyon & Baiba Skride
programme.desc: Leonard Slatkin conducts the Orchestre national de Lyon in a concert recorded at the Auditorium de Lyon in France, 2013. The concert is a tribute to the organ of the Maurice-Ravel Auditorium, which was made by Aristide Cavaillé-Coll. The program features three works which premiered on exactly the same organ: Camille Saint-Saëns' Cyprès et Lauriers and Symphony No. 3 and Poulenc's Concerto for Organ, Timpani and Strings. Soloist is Vincent Warnier.

programme.desc: Un joven rebelde y atrevido, Ignacio "Nacho" Montero, se dedica al contrabando de cigarrillos y pronto descubre que puede dedicarse a la venta y distribución de marihuana. Nacho conoce a Pablo Escobar en Medellín.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica vuelve a casa y se encuentra con noticias impactantes. Tras una llamada de su hija Rutila, Aurelio recorre Los Ángeles en busca del Turco y su familia.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Ximena confiesa que no ama al Turco, que solo sintió agradecimiento por él. Después de matar a Ronnie, Aurelio encuentra a su exesposa, quien le dice que nunca volverá con él.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Cecilia confirma su embarazo de David, pero él no quiere ser padre. Cuando Verónica se entera, abofetea a su hijo. Gastón le cuenta a Rodrigo, con lujo de detalles, la verdad de los lobos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: David reflexiona y está dispuesto a asumir su paternidad. Antonia asegura que alguien se encargará de interrumpir el embarazo de Cecilia. Macario visita a Ramiro en la cárcel y lo amenaza.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro: Joel arresta a Sofía
programme.desc: Cuando Sofía corre a los brazos de Joel, el agente le pone las esposas mientras, el francotirador enviado por Paula los tiene en la mira. Jennifer exige mudarse a Nueva York para alejar a Max de Eliza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara y Norma se enfrentan a balazos con los pistoleros que acorralan a Juan, la policía encuentra algunas pistas. Fernando comienza a manipular en contra de sus hijas a una sumisa Gabriela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela y Fernando llegan de la luna de miel cuando Pepa le prepara una divertida bienvenida a Jimena, Fernando anuncia nuevas reglas. La policía captura a varios sospechosos de los atentados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo les explican a los Reyes que se quedan en la hacienda ante el peligro que se cierne sobre Gabriela. Fernando contrata como mayordomos a dos antiguos enemigos de los Reyes.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Leonidas vuelve a ofender a Ruth y Juan la defiende, pero Óscar impide que su hermano lo golpee porque es el médico que atendió a Jimena. Leonidas pide perdón. Eva encara a Raquel sobre Ruth.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda le advierte al Chamoy que si vuelve a golpear a Santiago le pondrá precio a su cabeza. Justino encuentra a Paloma y a Leonardo juntos e insulta a su hija, pero ella se va de la casa. Irma le pide un préstamo a Melquiades.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo encuentra a Paloma y salva a Cachito de ahogarse, ella le da las gracias y se besan. Pedro va a buscar a Humberto para conversar sobre el pasado y, al final, abraza a su padre. Ignacio le ofrece a Basilio que trabaje para él.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro recibe una llamada de Cocó y Paloma se molesta. Cocó llega a casa de Perico y muestra su supuesto anillo de compromiso, por lo que a él le da un ataque de pánico. Ignacio le propone a Fernanda drogar a Leonardo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo cae en la piscina y Fernanda, aunque duda, decide salvarlo. Basilio va al Mercado la Raza y se topa con Leonardo. Sin embargo, esta situación lo confunde y decide investigar sobre Pedro. Inés le propone a Paloma que viva en su casa.

programme.title: Rosa diamante: La historia del diamante rosa
programme.desc: Rosa confronta a Raquel, le cuenta verdades a medias que son difíciles de asimilar. Rosaura está decidida a descubrir quiés es Rosa. Andrea se siente bien al estar cerca de Junior.

programme.title: Norteados con Don Cheto
programme.desc: Súbete a la minivan de Don Cheto, junto a sus amigos, sus aventuras, y su divertido programa de radio.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La luna de miel no es tan solitaria como Tarik y Gunés lo esperaban. Risa Bakir va a buscar al hombre que lo dejó a él y a Tarik en el mismo orfanato.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: Mukadder y Yuyu se empeñan en buscar la verdad. Fulden y Aisel tienen un enfrentamiento. Hakan rechaza una oferta laboral por Pelin.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La luna de miel de Tarik y Gunés fue sorpresivamente invadida por los Ar. Selijá esconde información importante sobre el pasado de Tarik y Risa Bakir.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: Hakan se lleva a Pelin a Estambul sin notificar a nadie. Los Ar se alarman cuando descubren que Pelin no aparece por ningún lado.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: Risa Bakir y Mukadder se ponen de acuerdo para ir a visitar al hombre que dejó a Tarik y Risa en el orfanato. Gunés prepara una gran cena para los Ar.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Erdogan y Munir discuten por Mustafá. Mustafá tiene un cambio de actitud que asusta a Asu. Eve Nine le cuenta a Fatmagül acerca del padre de Kerim.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Vural no puede estar cerca de Mustafá. Eve Nine descubre el secreto de Mukaddes y la confronta. Los Yaşaran se enfrentan a un nuevo problema con Erdogan.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Munir y Resad hacen todo para que Erdogan no provoque más problemas. Las esperanzas de Mukaddes se van a la basura y termina muy decepcionada. Fatmagül se enfrenta a un dilema.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Asu confiesa sus sentimientos a Mustafá. Meltem intenta decirles la verdad a sus padres pero Risad la interrumpe. Fatmagül recibe una visita inesperada.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Fatmagül por fin le dice a Mustafá todo lo que siente. Kerim y Mukaddes van a declarar a la policía. Mustafá explota con sus padres. Farmagul y los demás buscan un nuevo lugar para vivir.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Mustafá intenta redimirse con Asu. Mustafá va a hacerle una propuesta a Rasad. Eve Nine también hace una visita a los Yaşaran. Erdogan, Selim y Vural están preocupados.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Los Yaşaran buscan hacer un trato con Mustafá. Vural sigue atormentado por la actitud de Erdogan. Meltem sigue indagando en el tema de Fatmagül. Kerim hace una compra que causa emoción en la familia.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Fatmagül encuentra un empleo. Eve Nine se da cuenta de lo que hizo Mukaddes con la evidencia de esa fatídica noche. Mustafá logra un acuerdo con los Yaşaran. Meltem sigue en busca de la verdad.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Vural le dice a Erdogan lo que piensa de él. Kerim recibe un correo electrónico de una vieja amiga. Mukaddes recuerda cosas de su pasado. Fatmagül recibe su primer sueldo.

programme.title: Esta historia me suena: Nada
programme.desc: Una joven con baja autoestima se obsesiona con la exnovia de su pareja al grado de querer parecerse a ella para poder sentirse amada.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho: Agua que no has de beber
programme.desc: Un joven ve cambiar su vida cuando comienza romance apresurado con una joven. Ella resulta embarazada y esto altera todos sus planes, aunque trata de apoyarla sus vidas toman caminos diferentes.

programme.title: La rosa de Guadalupe
programme.desc: Rodrigo se siente desganado cada vez que su mamá lo compara con su hermano Iván. Por eso le pide a la Virgen de Guadalupe que su mamá le demuestre amor.

programme.title: La rosa de Guadalupe
programme.desc: Una mujer y sus dos niños reciben una amenaza. Ella deja a su hija al cuidado de otra persona y permanece escondida junto con su hijo, hasta que, finalmente, averiguan su paradero.

programme.title: La hora marcada 2023
programme.desc: Pipo, Pau y Mau, tres jóvenes que se dedican a grabar bromas en video, visitan un lejano pueblo donde una bestia está atacando a los habitantes. Al llegar al pueblo, los bromistas descubrirán que la bestia es muy diferente a lo que pensaban.

programme.title: La hora marcada 2023
programme.desc: Inés, una joven vidente, recibe la visita de Elena, una madre que busca averiguar cómo murió su hija. Después de informarle a Elena que no puede ayudarla, una serie de extraños sucesos comenzarán a atravesar la vida de Inés y su novio, Manuel.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Refugio cae en llanto al saber que Armando se ha muerto. Oriana le advierte a Fernando sobre Teresa y el interés que tiene en su fortuna.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Mariano realiza una cena muy romántica para pedirle a Aurora que se case con él. Luisa le pide a Fernando una nueva oportunidad para ser una pareja.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa enfurece al saber que Oriana le quitará todo su dinero a Fernando. A Teresa se le rompe el corazón al saber que Arturo ha comenzado los trámites de su divorcio.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa logra que Fernando ponga la casa de Arturo a su nombre. Oriana le pide a Arturo que no le dé el divorcio a Teresa para poder evitar que se quede con Fernando.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ramiro se entera que Soledad es la supuesta madre de Ana Lucía. Iñaki le confiesa a Ramiro que está enamorado de Ana Leticia.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ramiro le dice a Iñaki que Santiago va a pedirle el divorcio a Ana Leticia. Leonor busca a Facundo y le confiesa que Santiago está vivo. Ana Leticia le dice a Ana Laura que Valentín está con ella para vengarse de Ramiro.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ramiro le confiesa a Ana Laura que Ana Leticia aceptó ser su novia. Ana Laura le dice a Ramiro que Valentín quiere vengarse de él por la muerte de Gina.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ana Leticia le pide a Marcelo que le dé la oportunidad de conquistarlo, le dice que si no lo logra le dará el divorcio y él acepta intentar rescatar su matrimonio. Unos hombres secuestran a Ramiro frente a Ana Laura.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Clarita cree que Gaviota pueda estar embarazada, mientras que Rodrigo se encierra en la hacienda para alejarse de todos. Videgaray y Bruno dudan de las acusaciones de Aarón hacia Gaviota. Daniela le dice a Rodrigo cómo fue que descubrieron a Gaviota.

programme.title: Destilando amor

programme.title: Rubí

programme.title: Rubí

programme.desc: Amelia se pone muy mal al descubrir que Angélica decidió irse de la casa. Nadia le confiesa a Montserrat que está completamente enamorada de Víctor.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Mike tackles a recently renovated home where nothing is leveling out. The problems start with the HVAC, which sounds like a jet engine every time it's on. Sledgehammers compromised structure, cutting corners led to mould and there's asbestos in the basement. Mike brings in the pros to make this renovation right.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: A 5-year old house needs major repairs and the builder won't do anything to help. Mike Holmes and his team of pros step in to give the family the safe home they need and make up for the shortcomings of minimum code.

programme.title: Critical Listing
programme.desc: Kim and David jumped at the chance to buy their dream home – a bungalow in the suburbs with fewer stairs and a coveted pool. Now they've got to renovate and offload their downtown Victorian asap to avoid paying two mortgages. Lisa Colalillo, our real estate expert, must strategize their $15,000 reno budget into five times that amount of return. Interior expert Jo Alcorn targets the splintery stairs and lack of a master bathroom, while landscape pro Carson Arthur tackles lackluster curb appeal.

programme.title: Critical Listing
programme.desc: With tons of scrimping and saving Tracey and Steve have focused on building their new home from the ground up. Only now have they set their sights on selling their current house, which hasn't been touched in 22 years. Real estate expert Lisa Colalillo must navigate their $20,000 reno investment into a $100,000 return so they can sell and get into their dream nest. Of this amount interior expert Jo Alcorn must squeeze a kitchen and master bedroom renovation, and landscape expert Carson Arthur needs to pump update the exterior.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Katherine is an independent 34-year-old marketing and advertising professional who has the confidence to get up and do large scale client presentations and sing the national anthem at professional baseball games, but she feels absolutely overwhelmed in the kitchen. When she isn't feasting on one of her boyfriend John's culinary creations, Katherine simply relies on jars of salsa, cheese strings and spoonfuls of peanut butter for sustenance. However, that doesn't mean she hasn't tried to cook in the past. Currently on her cooking “Claim to Shame List” are ‘Peanut Butter Salmon Cookies' -- she accidentally baked cookies on a cookie sheet that she had just previously cooked frozen fish on and did not clean properly. Mmmm fishy cookies. Katherine also lists her one and only disastrous attempt at a Thanksgiving dinner, in which she ended up trying to “shake” the giblets out of a semi-frozen turkey. To this day, Katherine does not understand how anyone can throw a dinner party without servants at their disposal. This is probably because she grew up in an Italian household where her extended family did all the work, and Katherine was relegated to setting the table. However, now that Katherine is in a serious relationship with a man who is able to cook, she feels this is time for her to change her lifestyle and become more proactive in the kitchen. Christine will have her work cut out for her as she tries to take this non-cook from “inept” to “enthralled” in the kitchen.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Originally from Ireland energetic Rachel (25) has only been in Canada for six months but already works two jobs -- as an administrative assistant for a kid's talent agency and at an Irish pub at night. On top of a busy work schedule, Rachel still manages to find time to spend with her boyfriend, Sean, as well as take hip-hop dance classes. However, the one thing she would like to add to her routine is cooking and preparing her own meals. The problem? She has absolutely no culinary skills. While in university, Rachel's attempt to make dinner for her cousin resulted in sticky pasta with peas and corn that was so inedible they ended up feeding it to their dog. Time has not healed her culinary wounds. As recently as two months ago she served her boyfriend spaghetti in a watery sauce with bits of uncooked tomato. As a result of her lack of skill, Rachel spends very little time in the kitchen and tends to eat the same things over and over again (instant rice and cereal) or else she eats at the pub where she works. Although Rachel's parents are excellent cooks, she always felt intimidated by their ability and thus eschewed ever learning how to cook. It also did not help that Rachel's mother was very critical in the kitchen. However, now that she is living in a new country, Rachel feels she must stand on her own two feet in the kitchen, and the timing for her to learn could not be more perfect.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Join Georgia on an urban foraging expedition and learn from an edible and medicinal plants expert as he and Georgia collect a variety of items during a walk through the neighborhood. From flower studded ice cubes, to honeysuckle tea, to dandelion green salad, Georgia is making the most of what is around her. (S1 E04)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Women from around the country convene in west Texas for a transformative experience in the wild. During the episode, Georgia teaches viewers about the different cuts of venison and the ways to cook them, as well as how to save money by grinding your own meat. The guests and viewers will leave feeling empowered and with a different perspective on what it is to be a human and an omnivore. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia hosts a dinner party at her home in Austin, Texas, focusing on ingredients that are as locally sourced and homemade as possible. Pulling produce from her own garden, she turns it into pickled vegetables, tomato bread salad, a lemon balm cocktail and more! Georgia even decorates the dinner table entirely with items she has found in nature. (S1 E06)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia is in Charleston, South Carolina where she is preparing a dinner at historic Fenwick Hall. She invites a legendary queen of Southern cooking to come by and teach her the secret to her two ingredient biscuits, learns a Nigerian inspired cocktail from a local sommelier, and heads out on the water to harvest oysters. Georgia also shares her tips for setting a southern outdoor table. (S1 E07)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits Tuscany to get back to her own roots, and learn about the generations of families who are carrying on their family's traditions, some for centuries. She goes truffle hunting, learns to make fresh pasta, how to taste wine, and samples the incredible cheeses from the sheep grazing in front of her - experiencing the true value in living off the land. (S1 E08)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels back to the South of France, where she once cooked at a Michelin restaurant, and spends time in the olive harvest with a family who is carrying on the tradition of making olive oil. We learn about the herbs that are grown by a farmer late in the season to be infused in the olive oil, and how the oil is used by the baker who is baking bread using heirloom wheat. (S2 E01)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels to the Rosebud Native American Reservation in South Dakota and spends time with the Lakota people who are pursuing the “7-generation framework” – their vision for the next 150 years. She learns about the work they are doing to reclaim their food sovereignty, their culture and language, to bring their people back to that sacred place of equilibrium that is essential in building a strong and sovereign tribal nation - where they are physically, spiritually, and mentally whole. (S2 E02)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits the Catskills in New York, where a couple has created a stunning homestead and serves their community through weekly dinners that now attract people from afar. She heads out into the woods, into the root cellar, and into the kitchen with Jake and Elizabeth as they create a beautiful meal for dinner guests. The couple shares how they created this space and offer inspiring ideas for living and entertaining. (S2 E03)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits two women who are reclaiming the land that their ancestors once worked, while serving their community through food, farming and ranching. Georgia learns about the ways they are trying to impact and teach others to connect with the land and access healthy food. They roll up their sleeves together in the soil and in the kitchen, making recipes passed down through generations. (S2 E04)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia brings the audience into the kitchen with her to share delicious garden to table recipes. Along the way she pays a visit to an artisan beeswax candle maker who teaches her the art of candle making. Georgia then goes to sit at the pottery wheel with a gifted ceramicist to create candle holders and elements for a table setting. (S2 E05)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: In preparation for a dinner party, Georgia searches for wild edibles in unlikely places, and pays a visit to a pair of women glass blowers who create works of usable art in their glass studio in Brooklyn, New York. They work together to make glass pieces for the dinner table. Georgia brings us back to the kitchen to cook delicious dishes and set a table with their glassware. (S2 E06)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits a distinctive florist in Austin, Texas whose sculptural approach to flower arranging is unlike any other. He teaches her his approach and technique and ways the audience can create pieces that start a conversation and tell a story in their own homes. Georgia then stops off at a tea house to learn about the ancient and resurgent art of drinking tea from an expert. Georgia takes us back to the kitchen to make a delicious meal and integrate what she's learned. (S2 E07)

programme.title: Minutes of Fame
programme.desc: The confusion over Lou's new business relationship with Matt continues to mount. Matt and Froy find themselves in a nice neighborhood on a mission to repossess a security car from the world's most bumbling guards, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt hit the dock in an effort to reclaim an extremely expensive racing boat from its extremely offensive owner, and Lou, Froy, and Matt go on a mission to the backwoods to snag a total of five cars away from a group of misguided daredevil teenagers.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia try to repossess a car from a yuppie with a flair for the arts and for mayhem, Sonia, Matt, and Froy reclaim some unusual equipment from an overgrown hippie with some long hair and a short temper, and Matt and Sonia interrupt a house party to ask for a vehicle, but soon find themselves fighting for their lives against a troupe of enraged fire dancers.

programme.title: Think, Adapt and Attack
programme.desc: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats, chaos erupts, and Lou, Lyndah and Sonia fight not only with them, but also with each other. Down in Texas, Matt and Froy wait to clear up Froy's warrant and get in way over their heads working for a local repo team. Meanwhile, Lou decides to re-hire Frankie despite Sonia and Lyndah's objections, but first Lou wants to see how Frankie fares when faced with the temptation in the form of strippers and alcohol.

programme.title: The Crush
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus, and, Lou and Matt track a debtor to a junkyard.

programme.title: New Truck Day
programme.desc: The repo team's new truck finally arrives, and with it, a new chapter in the building feud between Team Lou and Team Matt.

programme.title: Angry Swarms
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck that's being used in a radio broadcast stunt.

programme.title: Burning Up
programme.desc: Lou's new business relationship with Matt starts to unravel when a botched job puts a serious strain on the company.

programme.title: Heart Attack Panic
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia are caught in a desperate situation when the owner of their target car is struck by a heart attack. Plus, a repo becomes violent under the watchful eye of the finance company. FSC_OperationRepo_S9E11_HD

programme.title: Crunch Time
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy interrupt a debtor and two maids who are getting hands-on with their job. A confrontation with construction workers goes bad, and somebody's vehicle will get destroyed.

programme.title: The Big Letdown
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas, he considers taking matters into his own hands. Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle. Then, when one woman behaves like a child, Matt puts her in timeout, but worries he may have gone too far. And finally, Lou, Matt, and Froy take on an jealous husband with deadly aim.

programme.title: This Is No Fantasy
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to a late model sedan with cans tied to the bumper and an angry bride in the passenger side. Next, Matt has to step in when Froy starts to lose it with a group of fantasy football players. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, and Lou are astounded when a loopy debtor douses his own car in gasoline and sends it up in flames.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.desc: Blessed with God-given talent, genes and mentality, Travis Kelce forged his name in the annals of American sporting achievements. As his life takes on another twist in the form of T. Swift, we take a look back at the journey of one of NFL's greats. Directed by Nick Randall.

programme.title: Kobe Bryant: A Tribute
programme.desc: The sudden and tragic passing of Kobe Bryant, alongside his young daughter Gianna left the world in a stunned silence. Never before has a sporting star held such high esteem outside of their profession… But Kobe Bryant was a superstar. Unmatched on the basketball court and cherished on the red carpet– Kobe's dedication to his career, his family and his charity work led to him being adored the world over. Directed by Danielle Winter.

programme.title: Jumpshot: The Kenny Sailors Story
programme.desc: From EP Stephen Curry, the award-winning film Jump shot celebrates the true story of Kenny Sailors, the forgotten basketball legend who introduced the jump shot, became a 2-time collegiate All American and NBA pioneer, revolutionized the sport for women, served as a US Marine in WWII, and then quietly faded into history. Featuring interviews with Kevin Durant, Dirk Nowitzki, and Bobby Knight. Directed by Jacob Hamilton.

programme.title: Lewis Hamilton: The Winning Formula
programme.desc: As the only black Formula One driver in history, Lewis' journey to becoming the most decorated Formula One driver in history, is one of dreams, courage, and determination. Directed by Piers Garland.

programme.title: A Fat Wreck: The Punk-u-mentary
programme.desc: Fat Wreck Chords... The influential music label proud to say they've spent the past 25 years “ruining punk rock”. A Fat Wreck tells the story of founders Fat Mike (of the legendary punk band NOFX) and his ex-wife Erin Kelly-Burkett, spanning the birth, growth, struggles, and survival of the Fat Wreck Chords label. Half inspirational story of chosen family and community, half debauchery and occasionally involuntary drug use... A Fat Wreck blazes exciting new ground in the cinematic genre of puppet-driven punk rock music documentary filmmaking. If you only see one film featuring a dominatrix spanking a puppet in your lifetime... Make it A Fat Wreck! Directed by Shaun M. Colón.

programme.title: Saving Paradise

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: The Outpost Lodge, Northern Kruger National Park, Limpopo Province
programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: FiftySeven Waterberg, Welgevonden Game Reserve, Waterberg Biosphere
programme.desc: Ending off her Romantic Safari Adventure, Sika visits Welgevonden Game Reserve set in the spectacular Waterberg Biosphere district of South Africa's Limpopo Province. Her eighth destination FiftySeven Waterberg is one of the Country's finest Boutique Safari Lodges offering the unhindered gift of glorious Nature right on its doorstep. With a firm focus on Conservation efforts, Sika experience this Game Reserve on the forefront of proactive Conservation Management and also get to relax and enjoy warm hospitality in an Oasis of 5-star Luxury within the midst of the African Wilderness.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. But did Tessa read the fine print in her contract? Action and chaos in the WOW Tag Team Division continues. And The Fabulous Lana Star stoops to a new level of in-ring-disrespect as she aims to secure victory through her prodigy, The Lioness at all costs. The shocking Main Event will determine who secures a championship title match against The Biggest, The Baddest, The WOW World Champion….The Beast!

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling

programme.title: Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Beast returns to the ring for the first time since her leg injury and leaves the audience in utter shock. programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa Blanchard into a match against a deadly mystery opponent. Adrenaline appears critically injured from being jumped by Exile and as such, her WOW World Tag Team Champion partner Fire is taking a stand. But it turns out the scorned Exile members aren't the only WOW Superheroes willing to deceive and harm the champs in pursuit of the tag team championship titles. Impressive newcomer and barrel riding champ, Casey Dakota makes her in ring debut. And the long history of battles that have ensued between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side members: Holidead, Siren, and the possessed Princess Aussie culminate into an all out war, resulting in the most shocking act that has ever taken place in WOW.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 1
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy the dazzling world of coral reefs in 4K you embark on a journey through some of the most vibrant underwater reefs on our blue planet - including many scenes which no longer look like this due to coral bleaching. From the cinematographer: "The footage for this film was shot over a period of some years in French Polynesia, Micronesia, Indonesia and East Timor. Unfortunately there are not that vibrant anymore today. Coral reefs have suffered from the rise of water temperature, rise in acidity, destructive fishing methods and severe storms caused by climate change." - Peter Schneider. "Rainbow Reef Relaxation" is a 3-hour long, sweeping yet majestic & vibrant underwater journey to the world's most beautiful lagoons, as captured by Nature Relaxation collaborator Peter Schneider (Underwatercam) paired with ambient underwater sounds and brand new ambient music by the Cynic Project. Filmed in High Definition several years ago, thanks to its age this film offers magical glimpses of an underwater world that is bursting with life, color, and beauty.
